_comment: BillboardStory section (home page). HOW IT WORKS: the section pins while scrolling; each step below owns an EQUAL slice of the scroll — step 1 plays first, then the billboard flips to reveal step 2's media on its other face, and so on, top to bottom. TO ADD/EDIT A STEP: copy one object in steps[], change the text, and point media at any image URL/path OR an .mp4/.webm video (videos auto-play muted on the board). The left text and the board face always stay in sync — no code changes needed.
label: On The Board
heading: One structure. Every story.

steps.title: The IPO the whole highway read
steps.body: 48 premium faces carried Suvarna Finance's countdown to listing day — re-skinned every Sunday night so Monday's commute always saw a new number.

steps.title: Diwali, dayparted to the hour
steps.body: NovaMart's creative flipped with the clock — commuter offers till 6 PM, full-motion festival spectacle after dark, synced across every screen in the city centre.

steps.title: Full-motion on the night network
steps.body: Digital faces run video, not stills. This is the actual loop from our LED network — drop any .mp4 into this slot and it plays on the board.

steps.title: Three weeks of mystery, one night to flip
steps.body: Café Arabia's unbranded black hoardings had all of Patna guessing. On reveal night we re-skinned 18 sites in four hours — this is the moment the city found out.
